name: StoreGenerationAndArtifactManifest
description: Authoritative generation metadata and immutable manifest for complete financial, evidence, reconciliation, dimension, and idempotency state.
schema_def: store_generation: generationId, schemaVersion, reconciliationPolicyVersions, createdAt, createdByVersion, status candidate or current or retained, verificationFingerprint. artifact_manifest: generationId, database and sidecar checksums, permissions, durable table counts, exact movement/spend and pool-category checksum totals, relationship/history checks, evidence identity and link checks, reconciliation decision/current-state checks, statement-scope coverage checks, payment attribution and pool cardinality checks, idempotency outcome checks, integrity and foreign-key results. CURRENT is an owner-private atomically replaced pointer. Ephemeral query snapshots are excluded.
